digest.en: Iranian forces claim to have seized two ships near the Strait of Hormuz. US President Trump extended a truce with Iran. Pakistan is pushing for talks between the US and Iran as a blockade standoff continues.
digest.hi: अमेरिकी प्रशासन ने मध्य पूर्व में युद्धविराम बढ़ाने का फैसला किया है। इस फैसले की अरब मीडिया में मिली-जुली प्रतिक्रियाएं हैं। कुछ मीडिया घरों ने इसे सकारात्मक कदम बताया है, जबकि अन्य ने इसे अपर्याप्त बताया है।

articles.title: Iranian Forces Claim to Seize 2 Ships After Trump Extends Truce
articles.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guards seized two cargo ships near the Strait of Hormuz, state media reported. The incident occurred as President Trump renewed a cease-fire, with both sides seeking control in the waterway.

articles.title: Iran Claims to Seize 2 Ships Near Strait of Hormuz After Trump Extends Truce
articles.summary: Iranian forces seized two ships near the Strait of Hormuz. The incident occurred after a cease-fire extension. Iran War Live Updates: Iranian Forces Claim Seizure of 2 Ships Near Strait of Hormuz After Trump Extends Cease-Fire The New York Times.

articles.title: Three Ships Attacked in Strait of Hormuz, Escorting Two to Its Coast
articles.summary: Three ships were attacked in the Strait of Hormuz after the US extended a cease-fire and blockade. The incident occurred despite a 10-day truce brokered by the US, which is set to expire.

articles.title: Banorte pushes cashless payments at Azteca as World Cup deadline nears
articles.summary: Mexico's Banorte is promoting cashless payments at its Azteca chain. The push comes as the World Cup deadline approaches. Banorte pushes cashless payments at Azteca as World Cup deadline nears.

articles.title: US and Iran in blockade standoff as Pakistan pushes for talks
articles.summary: A standoff continues in the Strait of Hormuz between the US and Iran. Pakistan is urging talks to ease tensions. The mood in the Strait of Hormuz remains combustible despite Trump's ceasefire extension.

articles.title: U.S.-Iran talks could be held in next three days, says Trump
articles.summary: US and Iran may hold talks within three days, President Trump said. Iran's Guards claim to have seized two ships attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz. Iran Guards say 'seized' two ships attempting to cross Strait of Hormuz; Iran says it has yet to decide whether to join a new round of talks with the U. S.

articles.title: Culture and Conversation Tables Bring the World to Maxwell - Maxwell School of Citizenship and
articles.summary: Syracuse University's Maxwell School hosts Culture and Conversation Tables. The event brings together people from around the world. Culture and Conversation Tables Bring the World to Maxwell Maxwell School of Citizenship and Public Affairs.

articles.title: EU Considers $106 Billion Loan to Ukraine, Delayed for Months by Orban
articles.summary: EU ambassadors meet to discuss a $106 billion loan to Ukraine, delayed by Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban's objections. After months of impasse because of objections from Prime Minister Viktor Orban of Hungary, ambassadors were meeting to discuss a key step on the way to disbursing the much-needed money.

articles.title: Iran says it has seized two ships in strait of Hormuz after Trump extends ceasefire
articles.summary: Iran seized two ships in the Strait of Hormuz after the US extended a ceasefire. Middle East crisis live: Iran says it has seized two ships in strait of Hormuz after Trump extends ceasefire The Guardian.

articles.title: Iran’s leaders debate war and peace after Trump ceasefire extension
articles.summary: Iran's leaders debate war and peace after Trump ceasefire extension, with some urging reason and moderation while state television pushes a line that Iranians want more war. State television pushes line that Iranians want more war, but others urge reason and moderation.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu and West Bengal to decide their fate tomorrow | Above the Fold | 22.04.2016
articles.summary: Tamil Nadu and West Bengal will decide their fate tomorrow in Assembly elections, as attention turns to polling day, with other news including the Iran-Israel conflict and a court ruling in the 2006 Malegaon blast case.

articles.title: London Marathon still in talks to stage 2027 race over two days
articles.summary: London Marathon organizers are still in talks to stage the 2027 race over two days, a decision that has not yet been finalized. London Marathon still in talks to stage 2027 race over two days.

articles.title: Trump’s ‘good news’ teaser on Iran-US Round 2 peace talks
articles.summary: Trump teased "good news" on Iran-US Round 2 peace talks, but details of the negotiations remain unclear. Trump’s ‘good news’ teaser on Iran-US Round 2 peace talks.

articles.title: Trump calls Iran’s leadership ‘fractured’. Is it, and who’s in charge?
articles.summary: Almost 53 days into the war, there is little evidence to suggest that Iran's government is fractured, despite Trump's claims to the contrary. Almost 53 days into war, there is little evidence suggesting that Iranian government is fragmented.

articles.title: 34 Iran Tankers Slip Past US Hormuz Blockade, With Over $900 Million In Oil: Report
articles.summary: Thirty-four tankers linked to Iran have reportedly slipped past the US blockade in Hormuz, carrying over $900 million in oil. The incident has raised concerns about the effectiveness of the US blockade.

articles.title: 2 Ships Attacked, Being Taken To Iran Amid US Stalemate: Report
articles.summary: Two ships, including the MSC Francesca, were attacked and seized, being taken to Iran amid a stalemate with the US. The incident has escalated tensions in the region. The MSC Francesca that has been seized and taken to Iran.

articles.title: "Good News" On Talks With Iran Could Come By Friday: Trump
articles.summary: Trump expects good news on Iran talks by Friday. He made the statement publicly. "Good News" On Talks With Iran Could Come By Friday: Trump. Trump had previously indicated he would not extend the ceasefire.

articles.title: Iranians are leaving the country just to access the internet
articles.summary: Iranians are traveling to Turkey to access the internet, as the country has been cut off from the global internet. They make video calls and then return home. Iran has cut off its access to the global internet.

articles.title: Horror Russia-NATO war warning issued by European spy agency
articles.summary: A European spy agency has issued a warning about a potential war between Russia and NATO. The agency has raised concerns about the rising tensions between the two. Horror Russia-NATO war warning issued by European spy agency Daily Express.

articles.title: EU Unveils 20th Sanctions Package on Russia: What’s Inside
articles.summary: The EU has imposed its 20th sanctions package on Russia. Details of the package are not specified. EU Unveils 20th Sanctions Package on Russia: What’s Inside Modern Diplomacy.

articles.title: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 summer flights as fuel prices surge
articles.summary: Lufthansa cut 20,000 summer flights due to surging jet fuel prices. The US-Israel war with Iran drove the price increase, prompting the airline to adjust its schedule. The airline is the latest to cut flights as the US-Israel war with Iran sends jet fuel prices soaring.

articles.title: अमेरिका की ओर से युद्धविराम बढ़ाने पर अरब मीडिया में क्या कहा जा रहा है?
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने ईरान के साथ युद्धविराम को आगे बढ़ा दिया है। इस पर अरब जगत के मीडिया ने प्रतिक्रिया दी है। मीडिया ने इस निर्णय के पीछे के कारणों और इसके प्रभावों पर चर्चा की है।

hi.title: अमेरिका की ओर से युद्धविराम बढ़ाने पर अरब मीडिया में क्या कहा जा रहा है?

articles.title: ईरान ने कैसे हासिल की ड्रोन तकनीक में महारत
articles.summary: ईरान ने ड्रोन तकनीक में महारत हासिल की है। इसका मकसद दुश्मन की रक्षा व्यवस्था को थकाना और उसके बजट पर दबाव बनाना है। ईरान इसी रणनीति के तहत अपने ड्रोन कार्यक्रम में निवेश करता रहा है।

articles.title: ईरान ने तीन मालवाहक जहाज़ों पर हमले के बाद दो को ज़ब्त किया
articles.summary: ईरान के इस्लामिक रिवोल्यूशनरी गार्ड कॉर्प्स ने बुधवार को तीन कार्गो जहाजों पर हमला किया और दो को ज़ब्त कर लिया. यह घटना ईरान जंग को लेकर ट्रंप की ओर से युद्धविराम को बढ़ाये जाने के बाद हुई.

hi.title: ईरान ने तीन मालवाहक जहाज़ों पर हमले के बाद दो को ज़ब्त किया

articles.title: ईरान अमेरिका से बात करने में दिलचस्पी क्यों नहीं दिखा रहा है?
articles.summary: ईरान अमेरिका से बातचीत को लेकर उत्साहित नहीं दिख रहा है। इस्लामाबाद में मंच तैयार है, लेकिन बातचीत करने वाले लोग अब तक नहीं पहुंचे हैं। सवाल यह है कि ईरान को क्या चिंता है।

articles.title: ट्रंप बोले, 'मुनीर और शरीफ़' के कहने पर बढ़ाया सीज़फ़ायर, मंगलवार को वॉशिंगटन में क्या-क्या हुआ
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रंप ने सीज़फ़ायर बढ़ाने की घोषणा की, जिसका उन्होंने दावा किया कि 'मुनीर और शरीफ़' के कहने पर किया गया। यह घोषणा वॉशिंगटन में मंगलवार को हुई। पाकिस्तान की राजधानी इस्लामाबाद में ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच दूसरे दौर की बातचीत होने वाली थी, लेकिन वार्ता नहीं हो पाई और ट्रंप ने युद्धविराम बढ़ाने की घोषणा कर दी.

articles.title: भारत ने संरा महासचिव पद की उम्मीदवार बाचेलेत से सुरक्षा परिषद सुधार के लक्ष्यों पर सवाल किए

articles.summary: ईरान में 1,300 स्कूलों में से 775 की मरम्मत पूरी हो चुकी है। यह मरम्मत अमेरिका और इस्राइल के हमलों के बाद की गई थी। बाकी स्कूलों की मरम्मत का काम जारी है और पढ़ाई ऑफलाइन-ऑनलाइन जारी रही।
